raw: This coupon must be presented to Plimoth Patuxet Museums guest services staff upon arrival at the Museum for Wellesley Free Library patrons to purchase a Heritage Pass , Combination Pass , or Plimoth Patuxet Only pass for up to six individuals at the reduced rate of $18 per adult; $12 per child ages 5-17. Visit https://plimoth.org/plan-your-visit for up to date visitor information, or call Plimoth Patuxet Museums at 508-746-1622 to speak with a member of Guest Services staff.
